description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:git image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called build. Add a job named build_android_image_alpha in the build stage that runs on docker tags, executes `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, then `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/alibitek-flutter/flutter-docker-images/android -f Dockerfile_Flutter_Android --build-arg BRANCH=alpha .`, and finally `docker push registry.gitlab.com/alibitek-flutter/flutter-docker-images/android:alpha`. Add a second job named build_android_image_master in the same stage that runs the same login command, builds with `docker build -t registry.gitlab.com/alibitek-flutter/flutter-docker-images/android -f Dockerfile_Flutter_Android --build-arg BRANCH=master .` and pushes the image with the tag `master`. Both jobs have no caches, artifacts, or rules.
